metadata.title: Sneaking Through B Site for a Quick 2v1 Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this clever B site flank where timing and calm aim secure two fast kills. What’s your favorite surprise angle to catch enemies off guard?

Share your clutch moments below!

Got a slick flank like this? Drop your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps
